# Attendee Demand

> **Type:** Analytics
> **Provenance:** 3P
> **Contexts:** [attendee, finance]
> **Measures:** [attendee-registration]

## Purpose

Lightweight demand-side analytics for a SUPPORTING context. Attendee retention (15%) is not a concern — 85% first-timers means growth comes from market expansion. Key measure is whether the demand side sustains the value proposition to exhibitors.

## Metrics

| Metric | Formula | Dimensions | Refresh |
|--------|---------|------------|---------|
| **attendee_count** | COUNT(checked_in) | edition, ticket_type | per-edition |
| **ticket_arpu** | ticket_revenue / attendee_count | edition | per-edition |
| **check_in_rate** | checked_in / registered | edition | per-edition |
| **ticket_type_mix** | COUNT per type / total | edition, ticket_type | per-edition |

## Benchmarks

| Segment | Target | Signal |
|---------|--------|--------|
| Attendance | >= 8,600 (2025 baseline) | Maintaining demand |
| Check-in rate | >= 85% | Low no-show rate |
| ARPU | >= $32 | Pricing power on tickets |

## Capabilities

- attendance-tracking
- ticket-mix-analysis

## Feedback Loop

- **Measured in:** Attendee (via Unity Event Solutions)
- **Consumed by:** Exhibitor (demand-side value prop), Event (marketing effectiveness)
- **Drives:** Marketing spend allocation, ticket pricing, venue capacity planning
- **Maturity path:** descriptive (sufficient for SUPPORTING context)

## Related Patterns

- `attendee-registration` — the domain pattern being measured
